title: Horizontal Glass Panes
body:
# Horizontal Glass Panes

![Glass Panes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jdwaIe52/images/1b33fd80ffffb1ce386f03e5e9acb856e2f89405.jpeg)

**26.1 requires [Balm](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm)**

**1.20.x versions require [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)**

Horizontal Glass Panes adds horizontal versions of Glass Panes as well as Iron Bars and Copper Bars (26.1).

## Crafting Recipes
Glass Pane / Iron Bars

![Glass and Iron Bars Recipe](https://github.com/witchica/horizontal-glass-panes/blob/26.1/recipes/ironBars.gif?raw=true)

Stained Glass Panes

![Stained Glass Pane Recipe](https://github.com/witchica/horizontal-glass-panes/blob/26.1/recipes/colorfulPanes.gif?raw=true)

Copper Bars

![Copper Bar Recipes](https://github.com/witchica/horizontal-glass-panes/blob/26.1/recipes/copperBars.gif?raw=true)
